sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65940" key="melea/grion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελε-άγριον</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελέ-αγρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a plant, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
